meta.title: Jonathan Beukes | Developer & IT Professional
meta.description: Jonathan Beukes — developer and IT professional based in South Africa.

about.name: Jonathan Beukes
bio: I'm a developer and IT professional based in South Africa, passionate about building things that live on the internet — from responsive websites to intelligent software systems.

Currently working as a Level 1 Server Support Engineer at NTT, managing and maintaining enterprise server infrastructure since January 2024. Alongside that, I continuously level up my skills in web development, software engineering, and AI.
When I'm not in the terminal, I'm designing interfaces, building side projects, and exploring what's possible with modern technology.

experience.title: L1 Server Support Engineer
experience.description: Providing Level 1 server support across enterprise environments — monitoring infrastructure, triaging incidents, resolving service alerts, and escalating complex issues to senior engineers.

experience.title: IT Diploma
experience.description: Comprehensive information technology program covering software development, systems administration, networking, and hardware fundamentals.

experience.title: SAASTA Certificate
experience.description: Certificate from the South African Agency for Science and Technology Advancement in recognition of achievement in science and technology.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Personal portfolio with dark/light modes, animated text reveals, admin backend (Node.js + Express), and dynamic content management.

projects.title: CTU Project
projects.description: A project from my studies at CTU Training Solutions. Source code and full write-up coming soon.

projects.title: Automation Scripts
projects.description: Server monitoring and automation scripts developed at NTT to streamline repetitive infrastructure tasks.
